41:1:1.m: Ha Meem (special letters at start of chapter)

41:2:1.m: a sending down (subject of this verse)

41:2:3.m: The One who shows complete and endless mercy (connected to مِّنَ before it)

رَّحْمٰنِ: One who shows complete and endless mercy

41:2:4.m: The intensely and constantly merciful (possessed by/connected to something)

41:3:2.m: it was detailed/explained (referring to ءَايٰتُهُۥ - His verses)

41:3:4.m: as a recitation (describing how the verses were detailed/explained)

41:3:7.m: they know (referring to a group who should understand)

ونَ: (referring to a group who should understand)

41:4:1.m: a bearer of good news (object of أَرْسَلْنَا)

41:5:2.m: our hearts (subject of قَالُوا - they said)

41:5:15.m: so work! (in response to their rejection)

41:6:1.m: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

قُلْ: say! (command to Prophet Muhammad ﷺ to speak to the disbelievers)

41:6:5.m: like you all (describing أَنَا۠ بَشَرٌ - I am a human)

41:6:10.m: a god (one of many possible gods)

41:6:14.m: and all of you seek His forgiveness! (plural command)

41:6:16.m: for those who join partners with Allah

41:7:8.m: those who reject faith (predicate of هم)

41:8:9.m: cut off/ended (describing a reward that is unending)

41:9:2.m: is it indeed you all? (questioning the plural audience)

41:9:5.m: he created (subject of creating the earth in يَوْمَيْنِ)

41:9:8.m: two days (time period in which اللَّهُ created the earth)

41:9:9.m: and you all make/set (as rivals to اللَّهِ)

41:10:3.m: mountains (because they are firmly fixed in the earth)

رَوٰسِىَ: mountains (because they are firmly fixed in the earth)

41:10:7.m: in it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

41:10:10.m: its provisions (referring to the Earth's sustenance)

41:11:8.m: to it/her (referring to السَّمَاء - the sky)

41:11:10.m: both of you come! (command to two - addressing the sky and earth)

41:11:14.m: they both (f) said (referring to السَّمَآء and الْأَرْض)

41:12:1.m: and then He completed/decided them (feminine plural)

41:12:6.m: and he caused to be revealed/inspired

41:12:10.m: its command/matter (referring to each heaven mentioned in فَقَضَىٰهُنَّ سَبْعَ سَمٰوَاتٍ)

41:12:13.m: the worldly life, this world (as opposed to the hereafter)

دُّنْيَا: worldly life, this world (as opposed to the hereafter)

41:12:15.m: and a protection (being done to the sky)

41:12:17.m: the precise measuring (of العَزِيزِ - the Mighty)

41:12:19.m: The All-Knowing (One) (attribute of Allah mentioned in تَقْدِيرُ ٱلْعَزِيزِ)

41:13:2.m: they turned away (subject of فَقُلْ - so then say)

41:13:3.m: then say! (command to one male) (connected to أَعْرَضُوا - they turned away)

41:13:9.m: and Thamud (connecting it to عَادٍ mentioned before)

41:14:13.m: they said (referring to the disbelievers responding to the messengers)

41:15:7.m: of the truth (connected to بِغَيْرِ - without)

41:15:8.m: and they said (connecting to their previous action of being arrogant)

41:15:12.m: a strength/power (as a description of أَشَدُّ)

41:15:14.m: they see (in أَوَلَمْ يَرَوْا۟ - 'Do they not see?')

41:15:16.m: Allah (as the object being referred to)

41:15:18.m: he created them (referring to the people of 'Ad)

41:15:25.m: they deny/reject (the signs of Allah that they know are true)

41:16:1.m: so/then we sent (connected to previous statement)

41:16:7.m: unfortunate (describing multiple days) - in genitive case

41:16:8.m: so that we make them taste (connected to أَرْسَلْنَا)

41:16:9.m: punishment (object of لِنُذِيقَهُمْ - so We may make them taste)

41:16:10.m: of the disgrace (part of عَذَابَ ٱلْخِزْىِ/punishment of disgrace)

41:16:14.m: and surely the punishment (subject of أَخْزَىٰ)

41:16:19.m: they are helped/supported/made victorious (negated by لا)

41:17:2.m: Thamud (subject of فَهَدَيْنٰهُمْ/so We guided them)

41:17:8.m: and then it (the blast) seized them (ثَمُودُ/Thamud)

41:17:12.m: because of what (they used to earn)

41:17:13.m: they were (subject of يَكْسِبُونَ - they earn)

41:18:1.m: and we saved intensively (those who believed)

41:19:1.m: and on the day (when Allah's enemies are gathered)

يَوْمَ: on the day (when Allah's enemies are gathered)

41:20:4.m: they came to it (when they reached the Fire)

41:20:9.m: and their skins (as the doer of شَهِدَ)

41:20:12.m: they work/act/do (referring to their senses and skin testifying against them)

41:22:12.m: and but (connects while contrasting with وَمَا كُنتُمْ تَسْتَتِرُونَ)

41:22:15.m: Allah (as the object being referred to in this ayah)

َ: (as the object being referred to in this ayah)

41:23:1.m: and that/this (pointing to something) for you all

41:23:6.m: he caused you all to be destroyed

41:24:2.m: they are/will be patient (if they are patient)

41:24:4.m: a dwelling/resting place (for لَّهُمْ - for them)

41:25:1.m: and we destined intensively (for them قُرَنَآءَ companions)

41:25:3.m: companions (as the object being assigned to them)

آءَ: (as the object being assigned to them)

41:25:5.m: for them/to them (connected to قُرَنَآءَ - companions)

41:25:11.m: and it became firmly established (subject of عَلَيْهِمُ)

41:25:21.m: the jinn (in a group with الإِنس/humans)

41:26:1.m: and he said (subject of this sentence)

41:26:11.m: you all defeat (referring to the disbelievers speaking in this verse)

41:27:1.m: and we will surely make taste (the disbelievers)

41:27:4.m: a punishment (object of فَلَنُذِيقَنَّ/We will make them taste)

41:27:7.m: worst (of what they used to do)

41:27:10.m: they do/act/work (referring to the disbelievers mentioned earlier in كَفَرُوا)

41:28:1.m: that (pointing to something far) (subject of جَزَآءُ)

41:28:6.m: for them (referring to the enemies of Allah)

41:28:7.m: in it (feminine singular, referring to النَّارُ/the Fire)

هَا: it (feminine singular, referring to النَّارُ/the Fire)

41:28:13.m: with/in our signs (which يَجْحَدُونَ they deny)

41:28:14.m: they deny stubbornly (referring to the disbelievers denying Allah's signs)

41:29:7.m: they both made us lose the right path (object of أَرِنَا - show us)

41:29:11.m: we will put them both (the two misleaders mentioned in أَضَلَّانَا)

41:29:14.m: so that they both may be/become (among الْأَسْفَلِينَ - the lowest)

41:29:16.m: the lowest ones (acted on by ليكونا)

41:30:2.m: those who (subject of قَالُوا۟ - they said)

41:30:3.m: they said (referring to ٱلَّذِينَ - those who)

41:30:10.m: the angels (as the subject of تَتَنَزَّلُ - descend)

41:30:11.m: that not (introducing what the angels say to the believers)

41:30:14.m: you all feel/will feel sad (connected to لَا meaning 'do not')

41:30:15.m: and give good news! (command to multiple people) (connected to وَلَا تَحْزَنُوا۟)

41:30:16.m: with the garden/paradise (that was promised to you)

41:30:18.m: you (all) were (referring to those who were promised Paradise)

41:30:19.m: you (all) are being promised/warned (of الْجَنَّةِ - Paradise)

41:31:14.m: in it (referring to الْءَاخِرَةِ - the Hereafter)

41:31:16.m: you all desire/claim (what your souls desire)

41:33:13.m: the ones who submit/surrender peacefully (plural) (object of مِنَ)

41:34:8.m: she/it (referring to الْحَسَنَةُ - the good deed)

41:34:9.m: better/best (than the bad deed mentioned before)

41:34:10.m: and then/and when (connecting to what follows)

41:34:16.m: close friend, protector (describing الَّذِى - the one who)

41:34:17.m: a close friend (like someone who has warmth/closeness towards another)

41:35:10.m: of a great portion (possessed by ذُو)

41:36:2.m: he definitely provokes you (object of وَإِمَّا)

41:36:6.m: so seek protection! (response to Satan's provocation)

41:36:11.m: The All-Knowing One (Divine attribute of اللَّهِ)

41:37:6.m: and the moon (subject of لَا تَسْجُدُوا)

41:37:8.m: you (all) prostrate (after لَا meaning 'do not prostrate')

41:37:9.m: to/for the sun (object that should not be prostrated to)

شَّمْسِ: sun (object that should not be prostrated to)

41:37:12.m: and bow down! (command to many people)

41:38:5.m: your Lord (possessed by those near Him)

41:38:7.m: to/for him (connected to يُسَبِّحُونَ - they glorify)

41:39:3.m: that you (object of تَرَى - you see)

41:39:9.m: upon it/her (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

41:39:11.m: it (feminine) shook itself (referring to الْأَرْضَ/the earth)

41:39:15.m: he gave life to it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

هَا: to it (referring to الْأَرْضَ - the earth)

41:39:16.m: surely the one who gives life

41:39:22.m: all-powerful (describing Allah's complete power over everything mentioned in the ayah)

ٌ: (describing Allah's complete power over everything mentioned in the ayah)

41:41:2.m: those who (plural - refers to كَفَرُوا۟ 'they disbelieved')

41:41:7.m: and indeed it (referring to the Quran)

41:42:3.m: the falsehood (subject of يَأْتِيهِ - comes to it)

ُ: subject of يَأْتِيهِ - comes to it

41:43:2.m: it is said (passive form of يَقُولُ)

41:43:4.m: except (what comes after from مَّا يُقَالُ لَكَ - what is said to you)

41:43:8.m: to the messengers (object of قِيلَ - was said)

41:43:14.m: a forgiveness (possessed by رَبَّكَ - your Lord)

41:44:3.m: a Quran (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ - we made it)

41:44:7.m: it was thoroughly explained (referring to the verses/signs)

41:44:27.m: they are being called out (the disbelievers mentioned in previous ayah)

41:45:3.m: Moses (the one who was given الْكِتٰبَ)

41:45:4.m: the book (what was given to Moses)

41:45:6.m: in it (referring to الْكِتٰبَ, the Book)

41:45:12.m: surely it would have been decided

41:45:14.m: and indeed they (are) (subject of لَفِى شَكٍّ)

41:45:18.m: causing doubt (describes شَكٍّ/doubt, showing it follows مِن/from)

41:46:10.m: with/by an extremely unjust one (to العَبِيد - the servants)

41:47:1.m: to him (connected to يُرَدُّ - is returned)

41:48:2.m: away from them (referring to false gods that the disbelievers used to worship)

41:48:3.m: what (that which they used to call upon)

مَّا: what (that which they used to call upon)

41:48:11.m: from (connecting what they used to call with before)

41:49:6.m: of the good (thing/matter) (possessed by دُعَآءِ - supplication)

41:49:8.m: touched/affected him intensely (referring to hardship affecting humans in this ayah)

41:49:10.m: then/so [he is] a despairing one (describing الْإِنسٰنُ/man)

41:50:3.m: a mercy (as the object being given)

41:50:9.m: he will most definitely say (in response to Allah's mercy)

41:50:12.m: and not/and what (connects to لَيَقُولَنَّ - 'he will surely say')

41:50:14.m: the Hour (as object of أَظُنُّ - I think)

41:50:21.m: for me, to me (connected to هٰذَا - this)

41:50:22.m: with Him (referring to Allah in this ayah)

41:50:24.m: and surely we will inform thoroughly (with strong emphasis)

41:50:26.m: they disbelieved (subject of فَلَنُنَبِّئَنَّ - We will surely inform)

41:50:28.m: they did/acted (referring to the disbelievers mentioned as الَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟)

41:50:29.m: and surely we will make them taste/experience

41:51:5.m: he turned away (from the blessings mentioned in أَنْعَمْنَا)

41:51:6.m: and he distanced himself (from the blessing)

41:51:7.m: by his side (acted on by نَـَٔا)

41:51:8.m: and when (connects to مَسَّهُ - touches him)

41:52:4.m: he/it was (describing something in this ayah)

كَانَ: he/it was (describing something in this ayah)

41:53:2.m: our signs (what we will show them)

41:53:7.m: until (connects to يَتَبَيَّنَ - it becomes clear)

41:53:11.m: the truth/reality (predicate of أَنَّهُ - that it is)

41:53:12.m: and has/did not...? (questioning what follows in يَكْفِ)

41:53:19.m: All-Witnessing (describes Allah's attribute of witnessing over everything)

ٌ: (describes Allah's attribute of witnessing over everything)

41:54:1.m: Now surely! (draws attention to what follows)

41:54:6.m: of the meeting (with رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)

41:54:12.m: All-Encompassing (a name of Allah, predicate of إِنَّهُۥ)

ٌۢ: (a name of Allah, predicate of إِنَّهُۥ)
